name: Nutrition Agent
description: An IBM Watsonx.ai-powered AI Nutrition Agent (NutriBot) specialised in Indian and South-Asian cuisine, Ayurvedic principles, and evidence-based dietetics.

IBM_API_KEY.description: IBM Cloud API Key. Create one at https://cloud.ibm.com/iam/apikeys

WATSONX_PROJECT_ID.description: IBM Watsonx.ai Project ID. Found in your Watsonx project settings.

WATSONX_URL.description: Watsonx.ai endpoint URL for your region (e.g. https://eu-gb.ml.cloud.ibm.com).

WATSONX_MODEL_ID.description: Watsonx model ID to use for inference (e.g. meta-llama/llama-3-3-70b-instruct).

FLASK_SECRET_KEY.description: Flask session secret key. Use a long random string in production.

FLASK_ENV.description: Flask environment. Use 'production' for deployed apps.

PORT.description: Port the Flask app listens on.
